title: Extended Auto Select ( XAutoSelect)
text: Extended Auto Select ( XAutoSelect) This property determines whether all the text in the current field is selected if it gets focus using the $prompt ProcScript function. True or False (default) XAutoSelect = " True | False " Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? Yes for Edit Box Dependencies: None Description The Extended Auto Select property has effect only if Auto Select is on. By default, it is cleared. If True , all the text in the widget is selected when the field gets focus as a result of $prompt to the current field. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "xautoselect=true" Copy Applies To EditBox urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) Related Links $prompt Return or set the position for the cursor in the Form when the current ProcScript module ends. Auto Select (autoselect) Determines whether the text in the widget is selected when the field gets focus. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
